title: Install + Set Up the SpiderPublish IDE Extension
summary: Install and bind the SpiderPublish IDE extension (SpiderIQ.spideriq-publish) in VSCode, Cursor, Antigravity, Windsurf, or any VSCode-API-compatible editor. Use whenever the user asks 'install SpiderPublish in my IDE', 'VSCode extension for SpiderIQ', 'edit CMS like code', 'native diff for content', 'pull tenant content into editor', 'SpiderPublish: Pull / Push / Deploy commands', 'how do I use the spideriq-publish extension'. The extension wraps @spideriq/mcp-publish (87 tools) as a child process and renders into native VSCode UI — same primitives, click-driven instead of typed. Three artifacts cover the full lifecycle: install.md (extension + auth + project binding), pull-and-edit.md (working tenant content as files + native diff + stage), push-and-deploy.md (5-phase push pipeline + Deploy Site + link audit + Code Actions).
